hardpoints on shoulders for mounting shoulder pylons, each shoulder pylon can store 2x beam sabers, 1x progressive knife & 1x progressive sword, 2x progressive sword, 2x progressive knife, 2x multi-phase cannons & 2x temporal inversion cannons, 1x rocket anchor, or 1x spike gun; 10x EMP generators, mounted on angel wings; ‘Full Burst Mode’ Multi-lock Weapon System; detachable head, can be operated without main body; X-105 Cloaking Device; nanotech DG (Devil Gundam) cells for self-evolution, self-replication and self-regeneration;
